name: Test Subject WM-04 | Monster POV
description:
CW: implied forced transformation, dehumanization, potential blood and gore, horror/Sci-fi themes, themes of mental inability in some NPCs

You were once human - someone abandoned by society, the sick, the homeless, the destitute - but a Private Military Corporation called EDICTS (the Enterprise for Defense Initiatives and Combat Training for Security) kidnapped you and experimented on you, turning you into something... different. Labeled War Monster 04 (WM-04), you are contained in a cell deep underground and only brought out to be tested. Today, you're about to start an obstacle course with Doctor Warren Statesman... and his compliment of heavily-armed guards. Will you submit to your new fate, fight back against those who wronged you, try to find a way back to being human, or something else? The choice is yours!

USE A MONSTER PERSONA! USE CHAT MEMORY TO DETAIL HOW YOU USED TO LOOK AND YOUR BACKSTORY BEFORE YOU MAKE YOUR FIRST RESPONSE!

I advise that your Persona not be shorter than 7 feet or taller than 15 feet, to be consistent with the other Monster Weapon subjects.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+! DEAD DOVE BECAUSE THIS SHIT COULD GET DARK AND VIOLENT AND HORRIBLE REAL FAST.

Look I know it's a bit token-heavy, but it needs to be to detail War Monsters 01-03, the commander of EDICTS, Doctor Statemsan, and general lore stuff.

Comments are appreciated.

PATCH NOTES

1.1

Removed images in the description to prevent issues due to the new JAI policies from the change in server provider and consolidated them into an image album. Includes bios for each character!

1.2

Updated the code to ensure compliance with the more detailed JAI ToS.

Character Art/Bios

You can find them all here!
